description.zh: 长方形纸片一转成圆柱、三角形一转成圆锥——旋转体亲眼看见！再用圆锥杯舀冰淇淋倒进等底等高的圆柱杯：一杯、两杯、三杯刚好满，×1/3 的秘密有了画面。
description.en: Spin a rectangle into a cylinder and a triangle into a cone — solids of revolution before your eyes! Then scoop with a cone cup into a cylinder of equal base and height: one, two, three scoops fill it exactly. The 1/3 finally makes sense.
